productDisplayName: Nike Men Hurricane Vapor Red Jacket
description: CompositionRed hooded jacket for men made of 100% polyester, has drawstrings for the hood, mesh lining, full sleeves, zippered placket, one zippered pocket on the side and a toggle strap at the back of the hoodFitRegularWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not bleachTumble dry on lowCrafted specially for runners but designed to look good on anyone, this jacket from nike is made of lightweight polyester with no bulky padding but an effective mesh lining. Wear this over your favourite tee on days when you have to brave the elements, or wrestle through the city traffic!
